Class User

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.User
public class User extends Object
Represents a User in the SmartHome system.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User(String email, String username, String password, String role, String status)
      Creates a user record for the smart-home system.
      Parameters:
      email - unique user email address
      username - display name or login name
      password - stored password or password hash value
      role - assigned role
      status - current account status

      Returns the email address.
